title: coryphopteris microlepigera
intro: Coryphopteris microlepigera is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as a type of fern. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in the tropical regions where it is native, due to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Coryphopteris microlepigera include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in treating various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Coryphopteris microlepigera typically involve boiling the plant in water to create a decoction, which can then be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
